github_trending.name: iptv-org / iptv
github_trending.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

github_trending.name: teslamate-org / teslamate
github_trending.description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘 [main maintainer=@JakobLichterfeld]

github_trending.name: Panniantong / Agent-Reach
github_trending.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

github_trending.name: chatwoot / chatwoot
github_trending.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

github_trending.name: krahets / hello-algo
github_trending.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

github_trending.name: freeCodeCamp / freeCodeCamp
github_trending.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

github_trending.name: trycua / cua
github_trending.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

github_trending.name: jwasham / coding-interview-university
github_trending.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

github_trending.name: rohitg00 / ai-engineering-from-scratch
github_trending.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

github_trending.name: music-assistant / server
github_trending.description: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

github_trending.name: Free-TV / IPTV
github_trending.description: M3U Playlist for free TV channels

github_trending.name: Raphire / Win11Debloat
github_trending.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

github_trending.name: mikeroyal / Self-Hosting-Guide
github_trending.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

themes.name: AI Agent 工程化
themes.evidence: GitHub Trending 出现 agent-skills、superpowers 等多个 agent 框架项目

themes.name: 本地化 AI 媒体
themes.evidence: Music Assistant 等自托管媒体库管理工具持续热门

themes.name: 太空经济平民化
themes.evidence: SpaceX 上市,马斯克成为万亿富翁,资本涌入航天赛道

opportunities.title: AI Agent 技能模板商店
opportunities.rationale: agent-skills、superpowers 等项目爆发,大量 AI 编程 agent 缺乏高质量技能包。建立垂直领域的技能市场,收 30% 分成。

opportunities.title: 出海英语短视频 AI 配音
opportunities.rationale: 中国卖家做 TikTok/YouTube Shorts 需要英语配音,ElevenLabs 类工具单条成本高。做按条计费的 SaaS,目标 30 万跨境中小卖家。

opportunities.title: 小团队 AI 流程顾问
opportunities.rationale: 欧美 10-50 人公司不知道如何把 AI agent 嵌入现有工作流。1-2 人顾问团队,按项目收 1-5 万美金,从 Replit / Cursor 客户切入。

opportunities.title: 开源医疗 AI 二开服务
opportunities.rationale: openmed 等开源医疗模型出现,诊所 / 心理咨询机构需要本地化部署 + 数据合规服务。技术团队 2-3 人,客单价 5-20 万。

red_flags: 通用聊天机器人 — 大厂已红海,差异化难
无差异的 AI 绘图工具 — Midjourney / Sora 占据心智
